It also describes evidence generation workflows, participant evidence integration, and overriding evidence period start/end dates via EvidencePeriodHook.

children.title: Identifying problems
Configuration errors: generation
children.summary: Lists seven Evidence Generator generation-time configuration errors tied to evidence properties, with each error’s symptom, cause, and fix. Covers: build/clean not running due to product.build.option; evidence not found from mismatched product.name; missing <EntityName>Details from product.ejb.package/CODE_PACKAGE mismatch; no XML source files from incorrect server.metadata; missing general.properties from bad properties.home; and another no-source-files case for EJBServer/Webclient. Useful for troubleshooting setup and path/package property misconfiguration.

children.title: Configuration error: runtime
children.summary: This section covers a runtime configuration error in the Evidence Generator: an HTTP 404 when accessing the generated evidence workspace. The cause is an incorrect product.codetable setting in evidence.properties, pointing to the wrong codetable directory. The solution is to set product.codetable to the product root code table directory. The page also briefly transitions into model generation errors, specifically an invalid mandatory field caused by a missing dtls association.

children.title: Model errors: generation
children.summary: This section describes a generation-time model error in the Evidence Generator: an invalid mandatory field error when running build generated from EJBServer. It explains that the dtls parameter for create<EntityName>Evidence is invalid because the mandatory association between the <EvidenceEntity>Details struct and the EvidenceEntity entity is missing. Useful for diagnosing evidence-generation failures related to malformed entity/detail model definitions.

children.title: Model errors: compilation
children.summary: Lists 11 Evidence Generator compilation errors for static evidence models and explains each with symptom, cause, and solution. Main issues are missing or misconfigured struct associations/fields in evidence entity models, including parEvKey, selectedParent, caseIDKey, descriptor, dtls, and caseParticipantDetails, plus a package mismatch causing `<EntityName>Details` not present in the model. Solutions consistently require creating the missing association between the relevant structs or aligning CODE_PACKAGE with product.ejb.package.

children.title: Metatype errors: incorrect participant, date, and comments
children.summary: Explains common metatype errors in evidence metadata for participant, date, and comments fields. If the case participant role ID field lacks CASE_PARTICIPANT_SEARCH or PARENT_CASE_PARTICIPANT_ROLE_ID, the participant name won’t appear as a link. If START_DATE or END_DATE metatypes are missing, start/end dates won’t populate on the evidence workspace. An incorrect comments metatype causes the comments box to render as a single-row field using only half the screen.

children.title: Property errors: generation
children.summary: This section lists common generation-time property errors in Cúram static evidence generation. It covers missing `general.properties` and `employment.properties` files under `$properties.home`, and unresolved text properties when a required key is absent from either file. For each error it gives symptom, cause, and solution, including creating the missing file, setting `properties.home`, or adding the missing property key. It also briefly describes the role of `general.properties` and `employment.properties` as sources of localized label values.

Explains how to diagnose Evidence Generator problems from setup to model/property issues. Covers seven generation configuration errors (build/clean not running, evidence not found, missing `<EntityName>Details`, no XML source files, missing general properties, no EUIM source files), one runtime error (HTTP 404 from incorrect `product.codetable`), one generation model error (invalid mandatory `dtls` association), 11 compilation errors from missing model associations/fields, common metatype mistakes for participant/date/comments, and property-file errors involving `general.properties`, `employment.properties`, and unresolved text keys.

Explains how to develop static evidence with the Evidence Generator: required inputs (RSA model, XML metadata, EUIM, properties) and outputs (server CRUD/list code, EUI screens/views, online help). Describes when to use the main evidence patterns—Parent-Child, Pre-Association, Related, Search Case Participant, and Validation CallOut—and the modeling rules needed for generator compatibility, including mandatory structs and associations. Also covers customization hooks for list/end-date behavior and common generation, compilation, metatype, and property-file errors.

Covers developing static Cúram evidence, either manually or with the Evidence Generator. Manual development explains required server-side and client-side artifacts, evidence metadata, and the interface hierarchy (StandardEvidenceInterface, EvidenceInterface, ParticipantEvidenceInterface) with methods for attribution, list display, transfer, dates, reassessment, snapshots, changed attributes, and participant searches. Also notes upgrade-safe client customization, filters, Guice bindings, and wizard end-dating transaction/rollback behavior. The generator path covers required inputs/outputs, evidence patterns, modeling rules, customization hooks, and common generation, metatype, and property-file errors.
